_comment: AI Chat configuration template. Copy this to ai-config.local.json (gitignored) and fill in your key for local development.
_production: In production (GitHub Pages), the ai-config.json file is generated at build time from the GEMINI_API_KEY GitHub Secret — never committed with a real key.
_setup_ci: Set GEMINI_API_KEY in GitHub repo Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions.
_setup_worker: For production without committing any key: deploy Cloudflare Worker and set worker_url below. FREE: 100K req/day.
